title: Redstone Cascade
description: this mod aims to bring classic half-life enemies and features to Minecraft
body:
![Title](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1274928151872405554/1274935218645499976/redstone_cascade_logo.png?ex=66c40f73&is=66c2bdf3&hm=90ee5ab6f1bba2f266de40094ce1d8f60f1c4961af8335931d83b4690f45003c&=&format=webp&quality=lossless&width=1449&height=228)

### DESCRIPTION

#### this mod aims to bring classic half-life enemies and features to Minecraft

![Headcrab Zombie](https://i.imgur.com/MlxLIzN.png)
![Houndeye](https://i.imgur.com/8Ay7uOs.png)
![Bullsquid](https://i.imgur.com/cRUW2KA.png)

### Details

- Entites

Headcrab, Headcrab Zombie, Houndeye, Bullsquid

- Items

Crowbar, Pistol
